name: Jamaica
startIntroPart1: Blessings from the most high, wise and righteous Queen Nanny of the Maroons and Jamaican people. As one of Jamaica's greatest leaders and rulers of the Maroons, your good influence on diplomacy and political cooperation as well as military tactics are praised throughout the world.
startIntroPart2: Revered Nanny, your knowledge and intelligence are required once again to protect your people from many threats in the world. Will you secure peace and stability, with benevolence and authority, with the spirit of your Maroon ancestors? Will the Jamaican people shine through the ages of history?
attacked: Yuh kno mi? Yuh a go find out!
defeated: Mi done! Better to die a warrior than live enslaved.
introduction: Wha gwaan mi friend. Listen to the one drop and hold a medi.
hateHello: Hi. Hello! Nuh badda waste mi time!
tradeRequest: Wah gwaan, yuh willing fi trade?.
declaringfriendship: Good friend better than pocket money!
